## Type

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation
- [ ] `refactor` / `perf` / `style`

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org)
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] CI is green (type-check · lint · test/build)
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
